description: This file defines an Angular component 'UnauthorizedComponent' that manages user interactions for an unauthorized access page, including tenant name input, validation, and navigation upon login or error handling.

classes.name: UnauthorizedComponent
classes.description: Angular component handling tenant input, validation, and navigation for unauthorized access page.

methods.name: ngOnInit
methods.description: Initializes the tenant form and redirects if tenant name exists in local storage.

methods.name: isFieldInvalid
methods.description: Checks if a form field is invalid and has been touched or dirtied.

methods.name: displayFieldCss
methods.description: Returns CSS classes based on field validation state.

methods.name: hasRequiredError
methods.description: Checks if a form field has a 'required' validation error.

methods.name: openErrorMessageSnackBar
methods.description: Displays a snackbar with an error message.

methods.name: login
methods.description: Handles login logic: validates tenant name, sets tenant config, navigates or shows error.
